name: sooo
description: SSOO - SI/SM 조직의 Opportunity-Project-System 통합 업무 허브

scripts.build:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-build --provider github-copilot --model gpt-4.1 --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run build:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run build:raw'
scripts.lint:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-lint --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run lint:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run lint:raw'
scripts.db:triggers: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://ssoo:ssoo_dev_pw@localhost:5432/ssoo_dev?schema=public} COREPACK_HOME=${COREPACK_HOME:-/tmp/corepack} corepack pnpm --filter @ssoo/database exec ts-node --project tsconfig.json scripts/apply-triggers.ts
scripts.docs:typedoc: pnpm --filter server docs:typedoc && pnpm --filter web-pms docs:typedoc && pnpm --filter @ssoo/types docs:typedoc
scripts.docs:all: pnpm docs:typedoc && pnpm docs:openapi && pnpm docs:db && pnpm docs:storybook && pnpm docs:verify
scripts.verify:access-ci: pnpm verify:access-smoke && pnpm verify:access-admin && pnpm verify:access-dms
scripts.codex:check: pnpm run codex:verify-sync && pnpm run codex:preflight
scripts.codex:preflight:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-preflight --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run codex:preflight:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run codex:preflight:raw'
scripts.docs:verify:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-docs --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run docs:verify:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run docs:verify:raw'
scripts.verify:access-smoke:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-access-smoke --provider github-copilot --model gpt-4.1 --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run verify:access-smoke:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run verify:access-smoke:raw'
scripts.verify:access-admin:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-access-admin --provider github-copilot --model gpt-4.1 --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run verify:access-admin:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run verify:access-admin:raw'
scripts.verify:access-dms:observed: bash .hermes/scripts/harness-observe-command --stage stage8-verify --actor-role verifier --agent-id verify-access-dms --provider github-copilot --model gpt-4.1 --prompt-class verification --command 'pnpm run verify:access-dms:raw' --verification-command-label 'pnpm run verify:access-dms:raw'
